user.title: Connect to VU1 Server
user.description: Select how to connect to your VU1 Server.

manual.title: Manual Configuration
manual.description: Enter the connection details for your VU1 Server. Get the API key from the VU1 Server Web UI under Settings → API Keys (create or copy a key). The server's master key, stored in its config.yaml, also works.

addon.title: VU1 Server Add-on
addon.description: Enter the API key for the VU1 Server Add-on. Open the add-on's Web UI (Open Web UI), then go to Settings → API Keys to create or copy a key. The master key is printed once in the add-on log on first start and stored in /data/vu-server/config.yaml; it also works here.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure VU1 Server
reconfigure.description: Update connection settings for your VU1 Server.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with VU1 Server
reauth_confirm.description: Your VU1 Server API key is no longer valid. Enter a new one.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to VU1 server

error.value_min_greater_than_max: Minimum value must be less than maximum value
error.image_upload_failed: Failed to upload image to the dial

init.title: VU1 Dials Options
init.description: Configure update interval and dial settings

configure_dial.title: Configure {dial_name}
configure_dial.description: Choose what to configure for this dial.

configure_update_mode.title: Update Mode
configure_update_mode.description:
Configure update mode for {dial_name}

Choose how this dial should be updated.

upload_image.title: Upload Background Image
upload_image.description:
Upload a background image for {dial_name}

Upload a PNG or JPEG image. The VU1 dial display is 144x200 pixels.

configure_automatic.title: Automatic Mode
configure_automatic.description:
Configure automatic sensor binding for {dial_name}

Select a sensor to bind to this dial. The sensor's value will be mapped from the specified range to 0-100% on the dial.
